title: 3x3 Drill
description: The Drill3x3 plugin adds a custom drill tool that mines a 3×3 area instantly. It enhances gameplay by providing a powerful, configurable mining tool with optional custom models via a resource pack.
body:
Drill3x3
Drill3x3 adds a powerful custom drill tool that instantly mines a 3×3 area, making large‑scale excavation fast, efficient, and fun.
The plugin is lightweight, fully server‑side, and requires no client mods. A custom 3D drill model is available through an optional resource pack.

🔧 Features
• 	Mines a 3×3 area in the direction the player is facing
• 	Fully configurable cooldown, durability usage, and allowed blocks
• 	Optional custom drill item model
• 	Works on all Paper‑based servers
• 	No client‑side mods required

🎨 Optional Resource Pack (Custom Drill Model)
The plugin supports a custom 3D drill model through an external resource pack.
If the resource‑pack URL is set in the configuration, the server will automatically send it to all players.
If no resource pack is installed, the drill still works normally but appears as a standard iron pickaxe.

📥 Download the Resource Pack
You can download the official Drill3x3 resource pack here:
Direct GitHub Download:

This is a direct ZIP link compatible with Minecraft servers.
Direct GitHub Download:
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Redcraft-Gamergit/Drill-Ressourcepack/main/Drill.zip



📌 How to Install the Resource Pack (Server)
1. 	Open your  file.
2. 	Add or edit the following lines to server.properties :
resource-pack=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Redcraft-Gamergit/Drill-Ressourcepack/main/Drill.zip
require-resource-pack=true

3. 	Save the file and restart your server.
4. You can also set the resource‑pack URL inside the plugin’s :
texturepack_url: true
5. 	Players will now automatically receive the custom drill model.


Leaving this field empty disables the custom model, but the drill still functions normally
